personal_details.health_conditions: Mild seasonal pollen allergy (spring and early summer). Typically managed with over-the-counter antihistamines (e.g., cetirizine) taken before going outside on high-pollen days. No history of anaphylaxis, asthma, or severe reactions. No other known medical conditions, no regular medications, and no activity restrictions from his pediatrician. Ethan’s parents have asked to be contacted if he experiences persistent sneezing, itchy/watery eyes, or any unusual symptoms during outdoor activities so they can advise on whether he needs medication or to sit out of outdoor time temporarily.
